answer_key.9: begin (happening X begins at time T)

instructions: BLIND style spot-check (fork F-KN-A, design doc section 2.3): read the 10 definitions below WITHOUT looking at answer_key. For each, judge: (a) does it read as ordinary dictionary-register English (not NSM-style controlled language)? (b) is it a fair definition a general dictionary could print? Record verdicts, then unblind.

items.definition: an embrace in which the arms are clasped around another person in affection, comfort, or greeting; also, any close encircling hold or pressure, such as that of a garment fitting tight about the body
(of a person, animal, or plant) no longer alive; having permanently ceased the functions of life
capable of being seen; perceptible by the eye, whether directly or with the aid of an instrument
an adult female human being; a female person who has passed from girlhood to full age; also, the female part of the human race considered collectively

a domesticated carnivorous mammal of the wolf family, kept as a companion, a guard, or a worker and distinguished from its wild kin by its long dependence on human keepers; it has a keen sense of smell, and barks, a habit its wild kin lack

a stored record of the address of a document or web page, saved under a short descriptive title so that the user may open it again without searching for it afresh; commonly one of a list kept within a web browser
a male parent; a man considered in relation to a child of his, whether the child is his by birth or by adoption; likewise, a male animal considered in relation to its own offspring
to form by putting parts or materials together; to bring into existence, as a craftsman fashions a chair or a cook prepares a meal
(of an act or course of conduct) contrary to morality or to accepted standards; deserving of blame or censure
to start; to perform or undergo the first part of an action or process; (of an event or state) to come into being or into operation
